text.content:
Structure

The Order of Hermes unites magi under the Code of Hermes, divided into Tribunals and Houses.

Code Highlights

Do not deprive another magus of magical power. Do not spy on another magus's sanctum. Obey your Praeco at Tribunal.

Major Houses

  • House Bjornaer — heartbeasts and shape
  • House Bonisagus — Hermetic theory and Trianoma’s politics
  • House Criamon — the Enigma
  • House Ex Miscellanea — diverse traditions
  • House Flambeau — martial magi
  • House Jerbiton — mundane arts and courts
  • House Mercere — Redcaps and messengers
  • House Merinita — faerie mysteries
  • House Tremere — hierarchy and certámen
  • House Tytalus — conflict as teacher
  • House Verditius — enchanted items

Record your magus House on the character header. Expand with your saga’s House details as needed.

Regional Tribunals

Each Tribunal governs magi in a region. The Grand Tribunal meets every 33 years.

Record your saga's Tribunal, Praeco, and current political tensions here.
